title: dimension_profile
description: Structured output of ONE axis-specialist analyzer agent. Each agent reads the raw samples + its slice of quant_profile + its taxonomy section, and returns the observed value of its axis group, a confidence grounded in how much sample evidence it found, rewrite rules phrased for the emitted skill, and before/after exemplars mined verbatim from the author's own text.

confidence.description: high: >=8 independent exemplars and a stable quant signal; medium: 3-7; low: <3 — the synthesizer will demote low-confidence rules to advisory.

sample_support.description: count of distinct in-corpus exemplars this axis was inferred from.

observations.description: plain-language findings about how this author handles this axis, each tied to evidence.

rules.description: actionable rewrite rules for the emitted skill (the per-person analog of S1-S8 / A1-A3).

id.description: stable id within the axis, e.g. SA1, RM2, CA1.

strictness.description: advisory when confidence is low or the trait is inconsistent in the corpus.

quant_target.description: optional numeric target linking this rule to a quant_profile band.

exemplars.description: before/after pairs. 'after' MUST be a real sentence from the author's corpus that exemplifies the trait; 'before' is a neutralized/plainer paraphrase of that same sentence (meaning identical). This proves the trait exists in real text rather than being invented.

quant_anchor.description: the subset of quant_profile.metrics this axis leaned on, echoed back for auditability.
